stories.title: As a product supplier, I can register and select product categories
stories.description: Product suppliers need to register and select Tier-3 categories they can supply so that they can receive orders for approved Inclusions.
acceptanceCriteria: Supplier can complete registration with business name, ABN, and contact details
Supplier can view and select from canonical Tier-3 category list (Assistive Tech, Mobility, Self-care, Domestic Life, Comms/Info, Home Mods, Body Functions)
System stores verified categories for validation
Supplier can optionally create price lists linked to categories
Supplier can view profile and add more categories after registration
stories.rationale: Simplest foundational workflow. Minimal onboarding validates basic supplier registration flow. Fastest path to value.
stories.independentTest: Complete supplier registration form, select Tier-3 categories, verify supplier profile created with verified categories stored

stories.title: As a home modifications contractor, I can complete verification with state-specific credentials
stories.description: Contractors need to complete verification with state-specific credentials (23 base + 8 state-specific documents) so that they can receive assessment requests for home modification projects.
acceptanceCriteria: Contractor registers with standard supplier business details
Contractor selects service states/territories (VIC, NSW, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, ACT, NT)
System shows 23 required documents plus state-specific contracts for selected states
System prompts for expiry dates for 6 specific document types
System displays state-specific contract requirements and registration disclaimers
Contractor specifies capabilities (ramps, bathroom mods, stair lifts, etc.)
Contractor profile created with pending verification status
Contractor can optionally configure quote templates
stories.rationale: More complex onboarding than product suppliers. Builds on basic registration flow with credential verification. Essential for home modifications.
stories.independentTest: Complete contractor registration with all required credentials, select service areas, verify contractor profile created with verification data

stories.title: As a contractor, I can receive assessment requests and submit quotes
stories.description: Contractors need to receive assessment requests and submit quotes with required documents so that compliance team can review and approve their work.
acceptanceCriteria: Contractor receives notification when assessment request is sent
Contractor can view request details (client, modification, location, deadline)
System displays required documents based on project state/territory
Contractor can upload quote document (PDF with pricing, scope, timeline)
Contractor can upload required compliance documents (Quote, Permit, Photos)
Compliance team receives notification when submission is complete
Contractor can view submission status and documents in portal
stories.rationale: Core contractor workflow after onboarding. Depends on contractor registration (P2) and ASS1 integration. Critical for home modification flow.
stories.independentTest: Create assessment request, contractor receives notification, views request, uploads quote and documents, verify submission received

stories.title: As a compliance team member, I can view all home modification works grouped by supplier
stories.description: Compliance team members need to view all home modification works grouped by supplier so that they can efficiently review and approve documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Compliance team sees only Inclusions with supplier type = Home Modifications Contractor
Works are grouped by contractor/supplier
Work cards show: description, client name, budget item, state, quote amount, approved amount
Document section shows per-document approval status and aggregate count (X of Y approved)
Status indicators show work status (New, Quoted, Under Review, etc.) and payment status (Pending, Partial, Paid) separately
Compliance team can filter by supplier, state, work status, payment status
stories.rationale: Primary interface for reviewing home modifications. Depends on contractor submissions (P3). Core value delivery for compliance oversight.
stories.independentTest: Create multiple home modification Inclusions with submissions, view Works dashboard, filter by supplier, verify all work details displayed

stories.title: As a compliance team member, I can approve or reject individual documents
stories.description: Compliance team members need to approve or reject each document individually so that contractors know exactly what needs fixing.
acceptanceCriteria: Compliance team can view document and see approve/reject actions
Approving document changes status to 'Approved' with timestamp
Rejecting document requires rejection reason
Contractor receives notification with rejection reason and remediation instructions
Contractor can resubmit corrected document with version history retained
Compliance team can see approval status for each document
All required documents approved marks compliance criteria as satisfied (updates Inclusion via ASS2)
stories.rationale: Enables granular document review essential for compliance quality. Depends on Works dashboard (P4). Core compliance functionality.
stories.independentTest: View submitted documents, approve some, reject others with reasons, verify contractor receives notifications, track status changes

stories.title: As the system, I validate product supplier is verified for Tier-3 category
stories.description: The system needs to validate product supplier is verified for Tier-3 category so that only qualified suppliers can bill for specific product categories.
acceptanceCriteria: ASS2 validation checks supplier.verified_categories includes inclusion.tier3_category
Validation passes when supplier verified for category, allowing Inclusion to progress
Validation fails with reason code 'Supplier not verified for category: [name]' when not verified
Failed validation prevents Inclusion from progressing and logs reason code
Product supplier can add new Tier-3 category and future validations use updated list
stories.rationale: Critical validation logic preventing billing errors. Integration point with ASS2 rather than standalone HMF functionality. Important for data integrity.
stories.independentTest: Create product Inclusion with specific Tier-3 category, attempt billing from supplier with/without matching category, verify validation behavior

stories.title: As a contractor or compliance team member, I receive automated notifications for key events
stories.description: Contractors and compliance team members need to receive automated notifications for key events so that they know when action is required.
acceptanceCriteria: Contractor receives notification when assessment request is sent with details and deadline
Compliance team receives notification when contractor submits quote and documents
Contractor receives notification when document is approved
Contractor receives notification when document is rejected with reason and correction guidance
Relevant parties receive notification when payment milestone is reached
Compliance manager receives notification when work is escalated
stories.rationale: Improves user experience and reduces delays. Core workflows can function without notifications. Enhancement priority - valuable but not blocking.
stories.independentTest: Trigger each notification event, verify correct recipients receive notifications with correct content
